{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Northstrider’s codex
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] used [[Northstrider’s codex]] to aid his modeling.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
